steps.title: Choose the conversion factor
steps.content:
To convert radians to degrees, multiply by a factor equal to $1$ that cancels $\pi$ radians.
$$\frac{180^\circ}{\pi}$$

steps.title: Apply it to the angle
steps.content:
Multiply the given radian measure by that factor.
$$-\frac{7}{18}\pi\cdot\frac{180^\circ}{\pi}$$
The answer is C.
